title: ジュニアCの後に・ライバル出現！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Thanks for everything, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Because of you, I was able to give it my all out
there! And now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I can't believe it. I'm finally gonna show
what I'm made of at the place I've always
dreamed about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna have to train even more. Gotta make
sure my prep's perfect, and then maybe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If McQueen isn't there, and I'm in the best shape,
then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We hurry back to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, on the center screen, is a broadcast of
another race.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's coming on strong! Incredible! She's broken
away from the pack! The other racers can't catch
up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner is Ines Fujin! Ines Fujin takes first
place!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, um... I'm sure everyone is here to see the
Mejiros, but I wasn't about to lose! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to the famous Mejiro Ryan, I'm the
one who knows her running the best—we're
roomies after all!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm so, so, sooo looking forward to the first round of the Classics! See you at the Satsuki Sho! ...Even if I'm a sidekick.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We watch the screen as Ines Fujin claims victory
at a different racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her tone is light, she's clearly issuing a
challenge to Ryan.
